a_image.alt: Carbon Design (IBM) style mood board — IBM · Carbon Design System

sections.a_eyebrow: Professional · Clean UI · Corporate · Modular Layout · Dark Mode
sections.a_description: The 2x grid, systematic spacing tokens, and the enterprise-grade rigor of IBM's open-source design system — Carbon Design embodies the precision of a company that has been building enterprise interfaces longer than most tech companies have existed. The sharp corners, structured layouts, and signature blue accent create interfaces that communicate competence and reliability.

This enterprise design system powers IBM Cloud, Watson AI, and hundreds of IBM's internal and external products. You'll see it on data-heavy dashboards, enterprise management consoles, AI training interfaces, and any application that serves the kind of professional users who need absolute clarity and consistency across complex, information-dense workflows.

a_image_cover.alt: Carbon Design (IBM) style use case illustration
Carbon Design (IBM) style use case illustration
Carbon Design (IBM) style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The structured, enterprise-grade aesthetic of IBM's Carbon Design System — the 2x grid, systematic spacing, and the precise, no-nonsense design language of big enterprise software. Background: Carbon gray 10 (#f4f4f4). The .inner panel has a white background (#ffffff) with a subtle left border accent (3px solid #0f62fe) — Carbon's characteristic emphasis indicator. Colors: Carbon blue (#0f62fe) as the primary interactive color — IBM's signature blue, precise and trustworthy. Carbon gray 100 (#161616) for headings, Carbon gray 70 (#525252) for body text. The aesthetic is methodical and systematic — every decision backed by research, every component documented, every spacing value on the 2x grid. Set in IBM Plex Sans — IBM's open-source typeface, designed to embody IBM's brand spirit of precision and progress. Heading at weight 600, 24px, line-height 1.3, color #161616. Eyebrow at weight 500, 12px, uppercase, 1px letter-spacing, color #0f62fe. Body at weight 400, 14px, line-height 1.5, color #525252. Buttons: primary — Carbon blue (#0f62fe), white text, 0 border-radius (Carbon's sharp corners). Secondary: transparent, blue border, 0 border-radius. Alternatives: IBM Plex Mono (technical), IBM Plex Serif (editorial).
